---
title: 'catalog log'
---

Show the catalog's history as a sequence of structured operations (the same
operations [`catalog replay`](replay.qmd) consumes when copying a catalog).

## Usage

```bash
xorq catalog log [OPTIONS]
```

## Options

| Option | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--json` | off | Output the operation list as JSON instead of the printed plan. |

## Example

```bash
xorq catalog log
xorq catalog log --json | jq '.[] | select(.type == "Add")'
```

## See also

- [`catalog replay`](replay.qmd)—replay this history into a different catalog
